family_summary: Episode-first bundle for the 2001-10-07 to 2021-08-31 Afghanistan war, focusing on subnational and city-level episodes across the intervention, insurgency, and endgame phases. Core DR uses direct violent deaths only and keeps civilian, military/combatant, and unknown-status deaths separate.
notes: The bundle prioritizes episodes whose geography and exposure denominators can be defended. Whole-country denominators were avoided for subnational episodes.
